message:
Default to uvx tenzir for pipeline execution (#14)

## Summary

Pipeline execution now uses `uvx tenzir` by default, removing the
requirement to have Tenzir installed in PATH. This makes the MCP server
easier to use out of the box.

- Default command changed from `tenzir` to `uvx tenzir`
- Added `TENZIR_BINARY` environment variable support for override
- Docker image sets `TENZIR_BINARY=tenzir` to use the pre-installed
binary
- Removed `.env.example` (documented unused environment variables)

## Test plan

- [x] Verified `uvx tenzir` works locally with `version` pipeline
- [x] Linters pass

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ The server exposes Tenzir functionality through the Model Context Protocol, enab
 
 ## Tool Categories
 
-**Execution** runs TQL pipelines and tests through Tenzir. Requires Tenzir installed and available in PATH.
+**Execution** runs TQL pipelines and tests through Tenzir. Uses `uvx tenzir` by default, configurable via `TENZIR_BINARY` env var.
 
 **Documentation** provides search and retrieval over embedded Tenzir docs with cross-reference support.

@@ -1,16 +0,0 @@
-# Tenzir MCP Server Configuration
-
-# Path to the tenzir binary (default: "tenzir")
-TENZIR_BINARY=tenzir
-
-# Default timeout for pipeline execution in seconds (default: 30)
-TENZIR_TIMEOUT=30
-
-# Directory for saved pipelines (default: "./pipelines")
-TENZIR_PIPELINE_DIR=./pipelines
-
-# Logging level (default: INFO)
-LOG_LEVEL=INFO
-
-# Enable debug mode (default: false)
-DEBUG=false

@@ -62,7 +62,57 @@ jobs:
           context: .
           # Only push for main branch and releases, not PRs
           push: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' }}
-          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
+          # Load image locally for smoke test on PRs
+          load: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}
+          tags: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' && 'tenzir-mcp:test' || steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
           labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
           cache-from: type=gha
           cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
+
+      - name: Smoke test Docker image
+        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+        run: |
+          IMAGE_TAG="tenzir-mcp:test"
+          echo "Testing image: $IMAGE_TAG"
+
+          # Test 1: Verify MCP server can be imported and starts
+          docker run --rm "$IMAGE_TAG" --help
+
+          # Test 2: Verify embedded data is present and valid
+          docker run --rm --entrypoint python3 "$IMAGE_TAG" -c "
+          from pathlib import Path
+          import sqlite3
+
+          # Check data directory
+          data_dir = Path('/usr/local/lib/python3.13/dist-packages/tenzir_mcp/data')
+          assert data_dir.exists(), 'Data directory missing'
+
+          # Check docs
+          docs_dir = data_dir / 'docs'
+          assert docs_dir.exists(), 'Docs directory missing'
+          md_files = list(docs_dir.rglob('*.md'))
+          assert len(md_files) > 400, f'Expected >400 docs, got {len(md_files)}'
+          print(f'✓ Documentation: {len(md_files)} files')
+
+          # Check database with cross-links
+          db_file = data_dir / 'docs.db'
+          assert db_file.exists(), 'Database missing'
+          conn = sqlite3.connect(db_file)
+          cursor = conn.cursor()
+          cursor.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM see_also')
+          count = cursor.fetchone()[0]
+          assert count > 1000, f'Expected >1000 cross-links, got {count}'
+          print(f'✓ Cross-links: {count}')
+          conn.close()
+
+          # Check OCSF schemas
+          ocsf_dir = data_dir / 'ocsf'
+          assert ocsf_dir.exists(), 'OCSF directory missing'
+          schemas = list(ocsf_dir.glob('*.json'))
+          assert len(schemas) >= 10, f'Expected >=10 OCSF schemas, got {len(schemas)}'
+          print(f'✓ OCSF schemas: {len(schemas)} versions')
+
+          # Test MCP server imports correctly
+          from tenzir_mcp.server import mcp
+          print('✓ MCP server imports successfully')
+          "

@@ -45,3 +45,6 @@ mcp_config.json
 src/tenzir_mcp/data/docs/
 src/tenzir_mcp/data/doc_index.json

@@ -1,13 +1,37 @@
-FROM tenzir/tenzir
-COPY uv.lock .
-COPY pyproject.toml .
+# Build stage: install dependencies for docs bootstrap
+FROM node:22-slim AS docs-builder
+RUN npm install -g pnpm@10
+WORKDIR /build
+# Install git, python, and build tools for node-gyp (tree-sitter-tql)
+RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git python3 build-essential && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+RUN git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/tenzir/docs.git docs && \
+    cd docs && \
+    pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && \
+    pnpm generate:excalidraw:placeholders || true && \
+    LLMS_TXT=true pnpm build
+
+# Python build stage
+FROM python:3.12-slim AS python-builder
+WORKDIR /build
+COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /bin/uv
+COPY uv.lock pyproject.toml ./
 COPY src src
-COPY README.md .
-COPY LICENSE .
-USER root
+COPY README.md LICENSE ./
+# Copy built docs from docs-builder (bootstrap will skip download, just index)
+COPY --from=docs-builder /build/docs/dist ./src/tenzir_mcp/data/docs
 RUN uv sync --no-dev
+# Bootstrap: docs already exist so only indexing runs, plus OCSF download
 RUN uv run python -m tenzir_mcp.bootstrap
 RUN uv build
-RUN uv pip install --system --break-system-packages dist/*.whl
+
+# Final stage
+FROM tenzir/tenzir
+ENV TENZIR_BINARY=tenzir
+COPY --from=python-builder /build/dist/*.whl /tmp/
+USER root
+RUN apt-get update && \
+    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3-pip && \
+    pip install --break-system-packages /tmp/*.whl && \
+    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* /tmp/*.whl
 USER tenzir
 ENTRYPOINT ["tenzir-mcp"]

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+---
+title: Add smart Tenzir binary detection
+type: change
+pr: 14
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2026-01-06T20:23:22.587204Z
+---
+
+Pipeline execution now auto-detects the Tenzir binary: it first checks the `TENZIR_BINARY` environment variable, then looks for a local `tenzir` installation, and finally falls back to `uvx tenzir` if uv is available. This removes the requirement to have Tenzir pre-installed while still respecting existing installations.

 """TQL pipeline execution tool."""
 
 import asyncio
+import os

 import time
 from typing import Annotated
 
@@ -13,6 +15,38 @@
 logger = get_logger(__name__)
 
 
+def get_tenzir_command() -> list[str]:
+    """Determine the command to run Tenzir.
+
+    Resolution order:
+    1. TENZIR_BINARY environment variable (explicit override)
